name: Red Domain Work Analyst
description: Work-domain specialist analyst. Clone of red-domain-neuron-analyst (same gemma4-director defaults) with a focused toolset: direct_worker (graph) to direct the 3 autonomous workers, automation + global-state readers to inspect worker state, the Work knowledge libraries, and calendar context.

neuronId.description: Neuron to run for domain response.

errorHandling.fallbackValue: I could not reach the domain model right now. Please try again in a moment.

tools.name: direct-worker-tool
tools.description: Send a directive to one of the autonomous workers (redbtn / become / eliteEntries): queue a one-shot run, set a strategic directive, or enable/disable the worker.

tools.name: list_automations
tools.description: List automations the caller can access (including the autonomous workers).

tools.name: get_automation
tools.description: Get a single automation config and status by automationId.

tools.name: get_global_state
tools.description: Read a single value from a global-state namespace.

tools.name: list_global_state
tools.description: List all key/value pairs in a global-state namespace.

tools.name: list_libraries
tools.description: List Knowledge Libraries the caller can access.
